title: ExtendedHorizons
description: Extend view distance with optimized fake chunks and far-player sync.
body:
![EH](https://i.imgur.com/cJ3108T.png)
![EH2](https://i.imgur.com/nyHmfDf.jpeg)

## Donation 
- Paypal: https://paypal.me/mapachedou
- Consider give us a star in [Github](https://github.com/Mapacheee/ExtendedHorizons).
---

## Dependencies
- [MapacheeeLib](https://github.com/Mapacheee/MapacheeeLib/releases/tag/v1.0.0) **Required!!**
- [FastAsyncWorldEdit](https://github.com/IntellectualSites/FastAsyncWorldEdit/releases) *(optional hook)*
- [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) *(optional hook) (%extendedhorizons_view_distance%)* 
---

## Support
- Report issues and suggestions in the repository’s Issues section.
- Join our **Discord**: [Discord](https://discord.gg/yA3vD2S8Zj)
- Github Repository: [Github](https://github.com/Mapacheee/ExtendedHorizons)
